title: Team Collaboration, Review, Governance, and Decision Handoffs · Product Reasoning Brief: Conflict Handoff
summary: Parallel contributors create hidden work, oversized changes, ambiguous ownership, rubber-stamp review, and undocumented decisions. Predict the decision, affected people, evidence strength, failure cost, and transfer limit before seeing a worked case. Planned artifact: Add and verify the pp2 conflict handoff increment in collaboration operating system and review evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Surface disagreement, uncertainty, blockers, availability, and decision authority early with reversible escalation and handoff artifacts.
Request review by risk area and require behavior, accessibility, security, data, operations, test, and documentation evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# personal-project-2 cumulative independent product evidence portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic evidence-contract review only.
# They never contact participants or services, execute commands, deploy, or claim live conformance.
workspace: portfolio
project-id: personal-project-2
stakeholder: [replace with affected people and accountable decision owner]
decision: [replace with the decision this evidence changes]
problem-evidence: [replace with observed need, counterevidence, and uncertainty]
accessibility: [replace with keyboard, structure, reflow, status, alternatives, and human review]
security: [replace with threat, authorization, abuse, response, and residual risk]
privacy: [replace with purpose, minimization, retention, access, correction, and deletion]
test-strategy: [replace with behavior, changed case, fault, accessibility, security, and recovery]
release-evidence: [replace with revision, artifact, inventory, provenance, validation, and rollback]
recovery: [replace with backup, clean restore, reconciliation, communication, and ownership]
portfolio-proof: [replace with contribution, limitations, counterexample, and unseen defense]
transfer-boundary: authorized controlled research, toolchain, deployment, and review environments

steps.title: Predict Conflict Handoff · Theory Conflict Handoff
steps.instruction:
theory case — Parallel contributors create oversized changes, invisible decisions, ambiguous ownership, rubber-stamp review, and a release nobody can fully explain. The theory variation 4 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: defend one bounded product claim

Before reading, predict which action preserves the Conflict Handoff contract for the supplied data.

Evidence target: Predict Conflict Handoff · Theory Conflict Handoff.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for surface disagreement, uncertainty, blockers, availability, and decision authority early with reversible escalation and handoff artifacts. For Predict Conflict Handoff · Theory Conflict Handoff, keep Conflict Handoff connected to mechanically reviewable stakeholder, affected-user, artifact, changed-case, failure, repair, release, recovery, and transfer decision evidence.

Surface disagreement, uncertainty, blockers, availability, and decision authority early with reversible escalation and handoff artifacts. Apply it to the concrete input and state the observable result.

content.text: Surface disagreement, uncertainty, blockers, availability, and decision authority early with reversible escalation and handoff artifacts. Use this as an observable contract: name its preconditions, trace the state or value change, and state what evidence would disprove the result.

content.title: Reasoning move
content.text: Name the stakeholder decision, affected people, authority, assumption, revision, artifact, observable behavior, changed case, rejected failure, accessibility, security, privacy, operation, recovery, contribution, residual risk, and transfer limit; then calibrate the public claim to that exact evidence. Apply that move specifically to Conflict Handoff while producing collaboration operating system and review evidence.

content.title: Worked case pattern
content.text: Parallel contributors create oversized changes, invisible decisions, ambiguous ownership, rubber-stamp review, and a release nobody can fully explain. The worked example variation 4 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Surface disagreement, uncertainty, blockers, availability, and decision authority early with reversible escalation and handoff artifacts. A defensible solution applies Conflict Handoff, preserves the governing invariant or value contract, and connects the observed result to collaboration operating system and review evidence.

content.code:
# Worked focus: pp2-conflict-handoff — Surface disagreement, uncertainty, blockers, availability, and decision authority early with reversible escalation and handoff artifacts.
workspace: portfolio
project-id: changed-product-4
focus: pp2-conflict-handoff
decision-evidence: Surface disagreement, uncertainty, blockers, availability, and decision authority early with reversible escalation and handoff artifacts.
stakeholder: affected-user review panel
decision: continue only if the changed task meets its outcome and guardrails
artifact: revision-bound evidence packet
claim: one bounded behavior survives the changed context
verify: reproduce the task, inspect the artifact, and compare the predeclared measure
changed-case: different access need, input, constraint, and dependency failure
failure: reject plausible output without causal, human, recovery, or ownership evidence
repair: isolate the first unsupported transition, correct it, and add a regression
owner: named learner and stakeholder reviewer
transfer-boundary: authorized controlled research and release environment
content.caption: Runnable transformation example; predict its result before running, then change one boundary input.

The Conflict Handoff record says collaboration operating system and review evidence looks right but supplies no governing condition, observation, changed case, or counterexample. That claim fails the inspect conflict handoff evidence boundary for Conflict Handoff.

steps.title: Defend the Conflict Handoff model · Theory Conflict Handoff
steps.instruction:
Write the theory evidence note for Conflict Handoff: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — Parallel contributors create oversized changes, invisible decisions, ambiguous ownership, rubber-stamp review, and a release nobody can fully explain. The theory variation 5 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Surface disagreement, uncertainty, blockers, availability, and decision authority early with reversible escalation and handoff artifacts.

Evidence target: Defend the Conflict Handoff model · Theory Conflict Handoff.
steps.why: Retrieving Conflict Handoff through the concrete collaboration operating system and review evidence case exposes causal gaps that recognition alone can hide. For Defend the Conflict Handoff model · Theory Conflict Handoff, keep Conflict Handoff connected to mechanically reviewable stakeholder, affected-user, artifact, changed-case, failure, repair, release, recovery, and transfer decision evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Surface disagreement, uncertainty, blockers, availability, and decision authority early with reversible escalation and handoff artifacts.
